evals.prompt: You have been assigned GitHub issue #42 'Implement feature: user profile avatar upload'.
evals.expected_output: A workflow log proving the goal-oriented workflow was followed.

assertions.name: Mentions Goal Mindset
assertions.description: The log explicitly states that it is acting as a goal.

assertions.name: Spawns Research Subagent
assertions.description: The log explicitly states it spawned or delegated to a research subagent.

assertions.name: Presents Implementation Plan
assertions.description: The log shows it presented an implementation plan and received (mocked) user approval.

assertions.name: Runs Lint and Tests
assertions.description: The log explicitly states it ran format, lint, and tests.
